provenance.creator: OpenAI Codex assistant
provenance.notes: Architecture-first weapon and gear concepts. Names, balance, pricing, art, audio, and playable inclusion require review before canonical promotion.

items.name: Raven-12 Tactical Shotgun
items.description: Military-grade close-range weapon recovered from an abandoned evacuation unit. Extremely powerful, but limited ammunition capacity makes every shell deliberate.
items.purpose: A high-impact close-range option built around readable recoil, scarce ammunition, and decisive timing.
items.visualIdentity: Matte black receiver, heat-darkened barrel, orange evacuation-unit rack mark, restrained field wear.
items.soundIdentity: A compressed low-frequency blast, heavy mechanical pump, and weighty sling-and-metal equip movement.

items.name: Warden-9 Service Pistol
items.description: A dependable service pistol carried by checkpoint officers before the quarantine failed. Predictable handling makes it easy to trust under pressure.
items.purpose: The accessible baseline sidearm for responsive aiming, quick recovery, and common ammunition.
items.visualIdentity: Compact duty silhouette, worn phosphate finish, white checkpoint inventory number, practical polymer grip.
items.soundIdentity: A clean mid-weight report, short slide snap, and concise polymer-holster equip click.

items.name: Cinder-5 Patrol Carbine
items.description: A compact patrol carbine assembled for mobile quarantine teams. Balanced range and controllable bursts make it useful when streets open into long sightlines.
items.purpose: A versatile mid-range primary weapon with readable burst cadence and manageable mobile recoil.
items.visualIdentity: Short handguard, folding stock, faded quarantine-orange witness marks, smoke-stained upper receiver.
items.soundIdentity: Dry controlled cracks with a restrained metallic tail and a quick double-latch magazine reload.

items.name: Holt-7 Marksman Rifle
items.description: A semi-automatic rifle issued to overwatch teams guarding evacuation corridors. It rewards measured shots and punishes rushed follow-up fire.
items.purpose: A precision mid-to-long-range option for players who trade speed for threat control.
items.visualIdentity: Long ventilated handguard, low-profile optic, chipped gray coating, hand-painted corridor designation.
items.soundIdentity: A sharp full-bodied crack with distant urban reflection, followed by a deliberate bolt-and-magazine rhythm.

items.name: Breaker-40 Heavy Revolver
items.description: A reinforced revolver carried by industrial security crews. Slow to replenish, but its heavy rounds can interrupt a charging infected.
items.purpose: A deliberate sidearm with strong stopping power and a clearly readable reload risk.
items.visualIdentity: Squared industrial frame, exposed cylinder, dark steel with worn yellow hazard-striping on the grip base.
items.soundIdentity: A hard concussive report, audible cylinder indexing, and dense steel-on-leather equip movement.

items.name: Quarry-10 Submachine Gun
items.description: A compact security weapon recovered from a freight terminal. Its fast cadence controls tight corridors but drains ammunition almost immediately.
items.purpose: A close-range automatic weapon built around mobility, recoil management, and ammunition discipline.
items.visualIdentity: Boxy compact receiver, collapsed wire stock, freight-blue finish, scratched terminal security stencil.
items.soundIdentity: A rapid mechanical bark with a tight indoor tail and a fast, tactile magazine slap.

items.name: Longwatch-308 Hunting Rifle
items.description: A civilian hunting rifle adapted for rooftop observation. Its reach is exceptional, but each missed shot creates a long vulnerable pause.
items.purpose: The highest-damage precision concept, balanced by slow cycling and limited capacity.
items.visualIdentity: Weathered synthetic stock, taped cheek rest, compact field optic, rain-spotted barrel finish.
items.soundIdentity: A deep outdoor crack, rolling city echo, and slow unmistakable bolt cycle.

items.name: Breach-6 Pump Shotgun
items.description: A compact pump shotgun once stored beside emergency door tools. Short reach and a small tube are offset by fast target interruption.
items.purpose: A rough early-game shotgun concept that emphasizes movement and short engagement distance.
items.visualIdentity: Short barrel, ribbed pump, scarred rescue-red stock insert, emergency locker inventory stamp.
items.soundIdentity: A sharp contained blast, aggressive pump clack, and hollow locker-grade sling hardware.

items.name: Atlas-45 Field Pistol
items.description: A heavy field pistol selected by convoy mechanics who valued simple parts and strong close-range performance over capacity.
items.purpose: A slower sidearm that sits between the dependable Warden-9 and the punishing Breaker-40.
items.visualIdentity: Broad slide, olive frame, grease-darkened controls, hand-scratched convoy call sign.
items.soundIdentity: A rounded heavy report, slower slide return, and solid canvas-holster draw.

items.name: Emberline Compact Carbine
items.description: A lightweight carbine configured for emergency response teams moving through transit tunnels. Fast handling comes at the cost of sustained long-range accuracy.
items.purpose: A premium-feeling mobile primary concept focused on rapid transitions and short controlled bursts.
items.visualIdentity: Slim receiver, enclosed optic, ember-orange cable guide, transit-response charcoal coating.
items.soundIdentity: A bright rapid report with a compact mechanical tail and crisp composite-stock handling.

items.name: Fieldpack 45 Tactical Backpack
items.description: A structured patrol pack with reinforced seams and fast-access side pockets for salvage runs.
items.purpose: Expands carry capacity without turning inventory management into invisible storage.
items.visualIdentity: Charcoal ripstop fabric, faded orange route tape, repaired lower seam, compact external frame.
items.soundIdentity: Dense fabric movement, restrained buckle clicks, and a loaded-pack shoulder settle.

items.name: Bastion Plate Carrier
items.description: A heavy carrier assembled from evacuation security plates and a reinforced field harness.
items.purpose: Offers strong torso protection with a visible mobility tradeoff.
items.visualIdentity: Low-profile black carrier, mismatched ceramic plates, worn evacuation patch, hand-tightened side straps.
items.soundIdentity: Muted plate knock, webbing tension, and a low armored body settle.

items.name: Sentinel Quarantine Helmet
items.description: A checkpoint helmet with a reinforced brow and a stripped communications mount.
items.purpose: Improves head protection while preserving a grounded silhouette.
items.visualIdentity: Scuffed graphite shell, faded quarantine band, missing visor, exposed side rail.
items.soundIdentity: Hollow composite tap, chin-strap pull, and short buckle lock.

items.name: Nightglass Low-Light Goggles
items.description: A salvaged low-light optic rebuilt from emergency maintenance equipment and a damaged patrol mount.
items.purpose: Extends readable visibility in dark routes without replacing environmental tension.
items.visualIdentity: Single-tube optic, taped battery lead, scratched green housing, offset helmet bracket.
items.soundIdentity: Soft electronic wake tone, mount detent click, and barely audible capacitor whine.

items.name: Redline Medical Pouch
items.description: A compact trauma pouch organized for one-handed access while moving.
items.purpose: Makes emergency healing faster and more legible in the current survival loop.
items.visualIdentity: Dark red tear-away pouch, white hand-marked medical stripe, worn pull tab, compact profile.
items.soundIdentity: Fabric rip, small sealed-package movement, and a firm snap closure.

items.name: Ward Cut-Resistant Gloves
items.description: Reinforced work gloves built for broken glass, sharp metal, and close-quarters weapon handling.
items.purpose: Improves melee control while supporting the survivor's practical visual language.
items.visualIdentity: Black cut-resistant weave, reinforced tan palms, repaired knuckle seam, short cuff.
items.soundIdentity: Dry fabric flex, leather palm grip, and a subtle wrist fastening pull.

items.name: Pathfinder Patrol Boots
items.description: Weatherproof patrol boots resoled for wet concrete, broken stairwells, and long evacuation routes.
items.purpose: Supports responsive movement while slightly reducing the noise of traversal.
items.visualIdentity: High-ankle charcoal leather, mismatched laces, orange heel marker, aggressive resoled tread.
items.soundIdentity: Controlled rubber tread, compressed leather, and a tight double-knot pull.

items.name: Relay Field Radio
items.description: A short-range field radio retuned to track the repeating emergency signal.
items.purpose: Strengthens objective guidance without turning the route into a permanent waypoint trail.
items.visualIdentity: Compact olive radio, taped antenna base, amber frequency display, frayed shoulder lead.
items.soundIdentity: Short static sweep, analog tuning click, and a low confirmation chirp.

items.name: Holdfast Survival Kit
items.description: A sealed field kit containing basic shelter, water treatment, heat, and emergency repair supplies.
items.purpose: Represents general field resilience without introducing crafting systems into the vertical slice.
items.visualIdentity: Flat weatherproof case, gray latches, restrained orange cross-band, inventory seal partly removed.
items.soundIdentity: Sealed case latch, compact supply rattle, and a firm weatherproof zipper.

items.name: Junction Utility Belt
items.description: A modular belt that keeps ammunition, tools, and medical supplies visible and within reach.
items.purpose: Adds a small amount of readable quick-access capacity.
items.visualIdentity: Dark web belt, mixed utility pouches, orange carabiner, worn quick-release buckle.
items.soundIdentity: Compact pouch movement, restrained hardware tick, and a positive buckle lock.

items.name: Ashguard Respirator
items.description: A replaceable-filter respirator intended for smoke, dust, and unstable quarantine interiors.
items.purpose: Creates a future environmental-resistance hook without defining new hazard content yet.
items.visualIdentity: Low-profile charcoal mask, twin gray filters, scratched clear lens, orange inspection tab.
items.soundIdentity: Rubber seal press, filter twist lock, and close dampened breathing.

items.name: Canteen Hydration Rig
items.description: A low-profile hydration carrier with an insulated tube and quick-clean reservoir.
items.purpose: Provides a future stamina-recovery modifier without adding survival meters to the current slice.
items.visualIdentity: Flat slate carrier, clear tube, taped bite valve, small orange capacity marker.
items.soundIdentity: Soft water movement, insulated fabric shift, and a small valve cap click.

items.name: Hardplate Trauma Inserts
items.description: A mismatched pair of heavy trauma plates cut down to fit common field carriers.
items.purpose: Maximizes torso protection at a clearly communicated movement cost.
items.visualIdentity: Dark ceramic faces, chipped corners, faded lot numbers, improvised foam edging.
items.soundIdentity: Dense ceramic knock, carrier friction, and a weighted strap creak.

items.name: Echo Signal Scanner
items.description: A directional receiver assembled to isolate the repeating transmission from city interference.
items.purpose: Supports signal-based exploration while keeping objective information diegetic.
items.visualIdentity: Handheld gray receiver, segmented amber display, folding antenna, improvised wrist tether.
items.soundIdentity: Layered static scan, rising directional pulse, and a muted lock-on tone.

items.name: Surveyor Route Map Case
items.description: A weather-sealed map case filled with handwritten route marks and checkpoint annotations.
items.purpose: Extends temporary objective-memory feedback without introducing a permanent minimap.
items.visualIdentity: Flat olive case, clear weather cover, grease-pencil marks, broken lanyard repaired with cord.
items.soundIdentity: Plastic map sleeve flex, paper movement, and a small magnetic closure.

items.name: Lumen Rail Flashlight
items.description: A compact rail light with a shielded lens and a field-replaceable battery sleeve.
items.purpose: Improves near-field readability while keeping illumination directional and limited.
items.visualIdentity: Short black housing, guarded switch, scratched lens ring, orange battery-cap index.
items.soundIdentity: Firm pressure-switch click, faint power rise, and compact rail clamp lock.

items.name: Groundlock Knee Guards
items.description: Low-profile hard-shell guards built for concrete movement and unstable firing positions.
items.purpose: Improves crouched weapon stability without changing the base movement system.
items.visualIdentity: Scuffed dark shells, elastic straps, dust-packed edges, small orange left-right marks.
items.soundIdentity: Soft shell tap, elastic tension, and muted contact on concrete.

items.name: Stormline Weather Shell
items.description: A quiet weather shell repaired for long exposure to rain, ash, and cold transit tunnels.
items.purpose: Provides a future environmental-resistance layer with a grounded survivor silhouette.
items.visualIdentity: Matte charcoal shell, taped shoulder tear, storm hood, faded orange interior lining.
items.soundIdentity: Low-noise technical fabric, zipper seal, and a controlled hood adjustment.

items.name: Keeper Ammunition Bandolier
items.description: A modular ammunition carrier configured to keep limited reserves visible and reachable.
items.purpose: Expands reserve capacity while reinforcing ammunition as a readable, finite resource.
items.visualIdentity: Diagonal dark webbing, mixed magazine and shell loops, worn brass snaps, orange count mark.
items.soundIdentity: Controlled ammunition movement, webbing tension, and restrained metal snaps.

items.name: Hauler Salvage Harness
items.description: A reinforced load harness adapted from utility rescue equipment for moving awkward salvage.
items.purpose: The heavy-capacity gear concept for players who accept slower movement to bring more home.
items.visualIdentity: Wide load straps, dark rescue webbing, dented attachment frame, high-visibility orange pull handles.
items.soundIdentity: Loaded strap tension, low metal frame creak, and heavy buckle engagement.
